description_long: This is a compact, tactical rifle with a black metal body and a prominent cylindrical under-barrel attachment, likely a grenade launcher. The rifle features a skeletonized folding stock, a pistol grip, and a ribbed fore-end for improved handling. The upper receiver is flat and streamlined, with a simple iron sight system mounted on top. The barrel is relatively short, ending in a plain muzzle without any visible device. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban operations where maneuverability and versatility are essential.
description: A compact black tactical rifle with a folding skeleton stock and an under-barrel grenade launcher, featuring a ribbed fore-end and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, folding skeleton stock, pistol grip, and the cylindrical under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle, under-barrel attachment, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, pistol grip, and the under-barrel attachment from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the rear sight alignment.
